name: xstockstrat — Ingest Signal (RSS Feed)

nodes.name: RSS Feed Trigger
nodes.notes: Replace the URL with the actual RSS feed URL for your newsletter source. Polls for new items automatically.

notes: Polls an RSS/Atom feed for new newsletter signal items, parses ticker and direction, and ingests via xstockstrat-ingest. Replace the feed URL in the RSS Trigger node. For multiple feeds, duplicate this workflow per source. The 'Parse RSS Item' node auto-detects source from the item URL domain.
